title: Card network badge
description: Card network badge (Visa / Mastercard / Amex / Discover / JCB / UnionPay / Diners / Other). Uses network-catalog.json for display metadata. Rendered as a small chip with network logo (from a shared logos asset). Never renders colour-only — always includes the network name text.

children.$expr: ({ visa: 'Visa', mastercard: 'Mastercard', amex: 'American Express', discover: 'Discover', jcb: 'JCB', unionpay: 'UnionPay', diners: 'Diners Club', other: 'Other' })[props.network]
